pr.title: HSD cobj/dobj symbolication + portable-decomp source batch

summary: Large 39-commit batch mixing HSD cobj/dobj symbolication with a wide portable-decomp sweep across people_field.c (the MusyX-audio-adjacent 'people_field' unit), gs_pokemon_summary.c, gba_misc.c, and several HSD files, converting cast-only pointer-arithmetic accessors into typed structs/bitfields while preserving existing byte-matches, plus a new KG (knowledge graph) callgraph tool and a renaming_dashboard.py rewrite (+3903/-310).
decomp_lessons: Converting cast-only struct views (e.g. u8 (*)[0xF4] arrays) into named typed structs with explicit field_XX/pad_XX members can be done without regressing an existing byte-match, if the field layout and access widths are preserved exactly.

Bitfields and small accessor helpers need portable (non-pointer-arithmetic) paths for readability, but must be verified per-function against objdiff since MWCC register allocation is sensitive to indexing style (see PR #2 for a concrete regression case).

Early asm .inc includes can predate a symbol-map rename; a scoped #define (e.g. '#define fn_80162118 sndBSearch' bracketed by #undef) lets old asm blocks keep compiling under the new name without a full rename sweep.
smart_moves: Introduced tools/decomp_work/kg/kg_callgraph.py (675 lines) to let the knowledge-graph dashboard rank/suggest symbol names from KG relationships (callers/callees) rather than guessing in isolation.
Documented the emerging decompilation roadmap in docs/decompilation_roadmap.md to track the honest-C conversion effort as distinct from raw byte-match percentage.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Typed PeopleFieldMoveSlot / PeopleFieldState structs replace u8[0xF4]-style raw byte-offset casts, with pad_XX filler fields keeping the struct size and access offsets identical to the verified-matching layout.
naming_conventions: field_XX / pad_XX convention for not-yet-understood struct members recovered from byte offsets (e.g. field_1C, pad_20) pending semantic naming.
'people_field' subsystem confirmed to be MusyX-audio-runtime-adjacent territory, not generic overworld field logic.

key_files.role: Largest source diff (+412/-77): PeopleFieldMoveSlot/PeopleFieldState typed structs replace raw offset casts across many move-slot and studio-helper accessors.
252/-303 rewrite recovering GBA status helpers with more portable/typed C.
HSD dobj symbolication additions as part of the cobj/dobj batch.
HSD init callback aliases kept local to preserved setup asm during symbolication.
New callgraph-aware knowledge-graph tool feeding name suggestions into the renaming dashboard.
Major rewrite (+3903/-310) to rank names from KG relationships.
